segments.text: Dodged by a hair! Just barely escaped!
segments.original_text: 紙一重、間一髪、間一髪で避けきって

segments.text: But still, that's a tough spot

full_text: Dodged by a hair! Just barely escaped! But still, that's a tough spot

corrections.original: 心、間髪、簡易一発で避けきって
corrections.corrected: 紙一重、間一髪、間一髪で避けきって
